description: Launch readiness audit for hx-select. Checklist: (1) A11y — axe-core zero violations, listbox pattern, aria-expanded, aria-activedescendant, WCAG 2.1 AA. Files: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-select/`, `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-select.md`
